items.title: Introduction to Statistical Learning (James et al.)
items.author: Gareth James, Daniela Witten, Trevor Hastie, Robert Tibshirani
items.note: Accessible PCA treatment, explained variance, and preprocessing context for dimensionality reduction.

items.title: scikit-learn PCA documentation
items.author: scikit-learn developers
items.note: API reference for fit/transform, explained_variance_ratio_, and n_components selection modes.

items.title: Pattern Recognition and Machine Learning (Bishop)
items.author: Christopher M. Bishop
items.note: Probabilistic PCA and PCA as variance-maximizing projection; connects to factor analysis.

items.title: NumPy.linalg.svd documentation
items.author: NumPy Developers
items.note: SVD implementation used to connect centered-data decomposition with PCA directions.
